user.title: Add Shark Vacuum Local
user.description: Add one compatible Shark vacuum at a time. Run this flow again to add more vacuums. Assign each vacuum a static IP in your router first.

data.name: Name (e.g. Downstairs Shark)
data.mapping: Mapping (leave default unless you know otherwise)

reconfigure.title: Update {name}
reconfigure.description: Enter the vacuum's new IP address. The integration will verify the local connection before saving and reloading.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the vacuum at that IP. Make sure it's on and on the same network.
error.wrong_device: The new IP belongs to a different vacuum.
error.unknown: Unexpected error talking to the vacuum. Check Home Assistant logs.

init.title: Shark Vacuum Local options
init.description: Update the vacuum IP address and polling interval. The IP address is tested before it is saved. Polling range: 5–600 seconds.
